generated_oml:
instance BuildingControlEngineer : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Handles device modeling and deployment initiation for the Digital Twin framework"
]

instance FacilityManager : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Manages real-time monitoring and control of physical infrastructure"
]

instance DTEngineer : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Extends Digital Twin capabilities through service integration"
]

instance BCSActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuator component within Building Control System"
]

instance BCSController : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Controller component within Building Control System"
]

instance BCSSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "General sensor component in Building Control System"
    DTDFVocab:producedData BCSSensorData
]

instance BCSSensorData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom BCSSensor
]

instance BCSData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time sensor data from Building Control System"
    DTDFVocab:fromData BCSSensorData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MDEEnabler
]

instance BIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Geometric BIM model enriched with semantic data for Building Control System components"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MDEEnabler
]

instance MDEEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Driven Engineering process for automated transformation of enriched BIM models into structured DT representations"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService, OperationalOptimizationService
]

instance StandardizedExtensionPoints : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Standardized extension points enabling DT Engineers to integrate custom services and analytics"
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveAnalyticsService
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of infrastructure status for AECO stakeholders"
    DTDFVocab:provides SystemStateVisualization
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for maintenance and performance forecasting"
    DTDFVocab:provides MaintenancePrediction, PerformanceForecasting
]

instance OperationalOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Operational optimization services to reduce costs and enhance collaboration across building lifecycle"
    DTDFVocab:provides CostReductionInsight
]

instance SystemStateVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Immersive interactive visualization of system states for Facility Managers to monitor and operate infrastructure"
]

instance MaintenancePrediction : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive maintenance insights derived from analytics services"
]

instance PerformanceForecasting : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Performance forecasting insights for infrastructure management"
]

instance CostReductionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Operational cost reduction insights from optimization services"
]

instance BuildingSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "A building asset in the AECO domain, encompassing lifecycle stages from design to refurbishment, integrating static models with runtime data for simulation and optimization"
    base:contains BCSController, BCSActuator, BCSSensor
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Interactive visualization provides immersive interfaces for monitoring and control, enabling Facility Managers to interact with the deployed Digital Twin for real-time monitoring and control."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time data exchange capabilities ensure continuous synchronization between physical buildings and their digital counterparts, with runtime configuration management enabling adjustments without requiring full redeployment."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The modular architecture features standardized extension points for component integration, with the DT Framework acting as a central hub facilitating bidirectional data exchange and holistic building lifecycle management, supported by runtime configuration management for adaptive adjustments."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin lifecycle encompasses initial device modeling within BIM for sensors, actuators, and controllers; Model-Driven Engineering (MDE) based transformation to structured representations; automated generation of deployable DT artifacts; real-time data synchronization between physical and digital twins; interactive visualization for monitoring and control; and modular evolution through standardized extension points for integrating custom services and analytics."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The DT Framework acts as a central hub facilitating bidirectional data exchange through a modular architecture with standardized extension points for service integration."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Model-driven deployment leveraging Unreal Engine for interactive visualization, standardized extension points for modular service integration, and runtime configuration management enabling dynamic adjustments without full redeployment."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Interoperability across heterogeneous systems is addressed through non-functional requirements, with the DT Framework facilitating bidirectional data exchange and integration with BIM tools for device modeling, supporting scalability from individual components to entire infrastructure systems."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The framework utilizes Building Information Modeling (BIM) standards for initial device modeling and incorporates standardized extension points to ensure interoperability and integration of custom services, addressing the industry's lack of standardized digital twin integration frameworks."
]
